summary: Terrible sax performance noted, recording quality not addressed
review: The sole reviewer gave this recording a single star, condemning the guest saxophonist as one of the worst they've ever heard and saying he ruins every song. No comments were made about the audio source or overall musical set, leaving the recording quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Based on a single 1‑star review that only criticizes the saxophonist; no information on performance beyond that or on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided in the review.
